audit_100_more_round_methodology: N. Time-series + version evolution (R121-130): boss_id continuity / schema evolution / foundation drift / origin tag / rollback artifacts
O. Concurrency/snapshot (R131-140): named file vs full / same id same content / order-independent hash / partial write detection / atomic complete / snapshot ts
P. Security/safety (R141-150): no secret leak / no PII / no path traversal / no command injection / regex DoS / strict types / int64 / SQL safe
Q. Performance/scalability (R151-160): file open / parse 1200 / serialize / memory / sqlite import / index O(1) / filter / gzip / no recursion / repeated parse
R. I18n deep (R161-170): combining marks / unusual codepoints / NFC blob / Latin Ext / no BOM / no LSEP/PSEP/ZWSP / no bidi / no emoji
S. Domain Việt history (R171-180): Lý/Trần/Lê/Tây Sơn/Nguyễn era consistent / F-era legends / hero pairing / yeu in f-era / ngoại xâm era / thập nhị sứ quân count

T. Combat balance (R181-190): hp/atk monotonic / def slower than hp / tier max hp ordering / enrage strict / phase strict / stat_mod not extreme / weakness not self / affinity 95% / faction tier covered
U. Output completeness deep (R191-200): expected files / no orphan / report mentions / schema docs / tests path / ai count / by_X sum / status keys / sha256 format / extensions match

V. Adversarial mutation (R201-210): inject dup id / inject BACH path generic / inject BACH element / drop required / corrupt UUID / roster-generic id disjoint / phases positive / bt phases non-empty / add_waves positive / NFC injection

bugs_fixed_root_cause.details: Roster v2 có element=HOA + weakness=HOA — self-weak invalid game logic. Sầm Nghi Đống là tướng Thanh (HAC path) bị Quang Trung (HOA + thần tốc) đánh bại tại Đống Đa 1789.
bugs_fixed_root_cause.fix_root_cause: Build-time sanitize: detect self-weak → override weakness via ELEMENT_WHEEL_COUNTER (HOA→THUY per ngũ hành: water extinguishes fire). Preserve original ở field _roster_weakness_original + flag _weakness_sanitized=true cho traceability.
bugs_fixed_root_cause.note: Roster v2 không bị mutate (IMMUTABLE rule). Em chỉ transform tại output build, log original.

bugs_fixed_root_cause.root_cause: Audit script không phân biệt generated output vs preserved legacy TS files (boss_ai_runtime.ts, boss_mechanic_runtime.ts, etc — Mr.Long preserved for CMD_ENGINE wire).
bugs_fixed_root_cause.fix: Audit R134 + R192 exclude legacy/ folder. Legacy files là reference, không phải generated artifacts.

bugs_fixed_root_cause.root_cause: le_era keyword list 8 từ — miss Trịnh-Nguyễn divide period (chúa Nguyễn 1558+, Thuận Hóa, Đàng Trong/Ngoài).
bugs_fixed_root_cause.fix: Extend pool 8 → 16 keyword. Skip yeumotruyen/truyenthuyet (mythical era loose).

bugs_fixed_root_cause.root_cause: nguyen_era keyword list 8 từ — miss anti-French period (Yên Thế, Bắc Giang, Đồng Nai, du kích, 1880s).
